nasb.text: The priest shall offer up the burnt offering and the grain offering on the altar. Thus the priest shall make atonement for him, and he will be clean.

esv.text: And the priest shall offer the burnt offering and the grain offering on the altar. Thus the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be clean.

cnv.text: 祭司要把燔祭和素祭獻在祭壇上，為他贖罪，他就潔淨了。

ccb.text: 在祭坛上献燔祭和素祭，为他赎罪，他就洁净了。
